key.name: kanata-port
key.description: Port number for kanata's TCP server

key.name: kanata-config-path
key.description: Path to kanata .kbd config file. Empty uses ~/.config/kanata/kanata.kbd

key.name: font-size
key.description: Base font size in pixels for overlay key labels

key.name: bottom-margin
key.description: Distance from screen edge in pixels

key.name: overlay-position
key.description: Screen position: bottom-center, top-center, bottom-left, bottom-right, top-left, top-right
